'''Reseros Meh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] who owned and ran a [[Momma Reseros' Diner|diner]] on [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. She disliked other Chevin as well as members of other [[Species/Legends|species]]. An excellent cook, she was very grumpy and had a gruff demeanor.<ref name="Slushtime" />

{{Char-stub}}
